commentaries.author: Douay Rheims 1609
commentaries.content:
And the sons of Josias were, the first begotten Johanam, the second (a) Joakim, the third Sedecias, the fourth Sellum.
(a) St. Matthew omitteth this Joakim, and counteth Jechonias as the son of Josias. The same Jeconias was also otherwise called Joachin. 4 Reg. 24. v. 6. & 25. v. 27. St. Jerome. li. 1. in Matth.
